xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: D.No 1-80-40-SP-58-65, Shilpa Homes Layout, Gachibowli, Seri Lingampally, K.V.Rangareddy, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500032.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: D.No 1-80-40-SP-58-65, Shilpa Homes Layout, Gachibowli, Seri Lingampally, K.V.Rangareddy, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500032.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Textile, leather and other apparel products
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: The Company is into manufacturing of Textile, leather and other apparel products
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Textile, leather and other apparel products
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: FILATEX MINES AND MINERALS PRIVATE LIMITED
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: The detailed provisions of the anti-corruption / anti-bribery have been covered under the Code of Ethics and Business Conduct and the Vigil Mechanism (Whistle Blower Policy)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WhetherAnyStepsAreBeingTakenBy: We recognize the importance of meeting the requirements of the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 and are taking proactive steps to support the needs of individuals with disabilities. The Company has implemented various measures to provide accessible infrastructure in factory and offices. The Company believes that accessibility is an essential aspect of social responsibility and are persistent in its efforts to create an inclusive environment for everyone.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfEqualOppertunityPolic: The Company is committed to equal opportunity for all employees and job applicants, regardless of race, colour, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, any other characteristics protected by applicable law. The Company prohibits all forms of discrimination and harassment in the workplace, including in all aspects of employment such as recruitment, promotions and transfers, training and development, compensation and benefits, job assignments, discipline, and termination. The Company is committed to building a diverse workforce that reflects the richness of the communities we serve and creating an environment where all employees can thrive
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: The employees are given freedom to approach the Human Resource Department or the Board Members as well
Additionally, Vigil Mechanism and Prevention of Sexual Harassment at workplace is made available on the website of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: The Company prioritizes creating a safe and healthy work environment for all employees and workers, being achieved through a well-structured Occupational Health and Safety (OHS). The HR department reviews the same from time to time.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: The in-house team review the risk on routine and non-routine basis.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company makes every effort to integrate safety into all business processes. The HR Department from time to time reviews that workplace is safe and healthy
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: The Company investigates all recordable incidents to identify the root causes and implement actions to avoid repeat incidents.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company’s in-house team has its own SOP to ensure that statutory dues have been deducted and deposited. This SOP emphasizes compliance with all applicable laws and regulations
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: The Company investigates any non-conformity reported in good faith and discuss findings with the partner(s). If remediation is needed, the Company works with the partner(s) to identify the root causes of the issue and to develop a time-bound corrective action plan to resolve the failure effectively and promptly. The Company takes a collaborative approach to overcoming challenges within its supply chain.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: For effective identification of the key stakeholders’ group that are essential for long-term success, the Company adheres to a rigorous stakeholder identification process, by employing a multi-faceted approach that considers impact, influence, and legal / financial ties. By analysing these factors through the lens of inclusivity, materiality, and responsiveness, the Company can effectively pinpoint the key stakeholder groups whose interests are most critical to consider in its decision-making processes. This focus on key stakeholders allows for targeted engagement and collaboration, fostering mutually beneficial relationships and ensuring the Company operates responsibly within its broader ecosystem.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Currently no such consultation or engagement are being undertaken.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: No currently the same is managed by the Board of Directors and In-house team of the Company as the corpus is not significant
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Investor and analyst meetings, Presentations at industry forums, Publishing and Circulating the Annual Report and Sustainability Report, Communicating Financial, Results to shareholders via quarterly meetings, AGM
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Investors and shareholders are pivotal in providing financial resources that support operations and sustainable growth. Transparent communication with them is essential for cultivating mutual trust and strengthening our relationship. Key areas of focus include: economic performance, transparency in operations, and alignment with our strategic goals for sustainable development.

Customer input is valuable for understanding their needs, enhancing product portfolio, and improving service delivery. Key areas of focus include: better pricing, Market reach, Premium quality, on time in full (OTIF)
Employee experience and satisfaction on monthly basis
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Interaction with communities through CSR Initiatives or engagements
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Engaging with local communities helps us understand their immediate needs and allows us to contribute meaningfully to sustainable community development.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Interaction with communities through CSR Initiatives or engagements
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Engaging with local communities helps us understand their immediate needs and allows us to contribute meaningfully to sustainable community development.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The employee can approach the HR department or the Board of Directors of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The Company recognizes the importance of fostering a safe and respectful work environment. To prevent adverse consequences for those reporting discrimination or harassment, the Company has implemented a robust complaint mechanism. This system prioritizes confidentiality, allowing complainants to report concerns anonymously if they choose. The Company also has clear anti-retaliation policies in place, ensuring complainants are protected from any negative repercussions for speaking up. Furthermore, investigations are conducted fairly and promptly, with dedicated support provided to complainants throughout the process. This commitment to a safe reporting environment empowers individuals to voice concerns and allows the Company to effectively address and prevent discrimination and harassment within the workplace. The whistle blower mechanism is in place.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: Not applicable, as the Company has not come across any significant concerns from assessments conducted at Company’s plant and offices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: The hasn't necessitated a change in core business processes. This reflects the effectiveness of the Company’s current procedures and its commitment to upholding human rights throughout the Company’s operations. The Company remains vigilant and uses these experiences as valuable learning opportunities to further strengthen its approach.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: Not applicable, as the Company has not come across any significant concerns from assessments conducted at the Company’s plant and offices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: Grievances and feedback can be shared through email at unisox@yahoo.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The Customer can lodge a complaint or give feedback at unisox@yahoo.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: Not applicable as no such instance is reported during the year
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImpactOfDataBreachesE: Not applicable as no such instance is reported
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The details of the products is available at https://www.filatexfashions.co.in/our-brands.html
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: The Company does not deal with essential services.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProductInformationOnT: Yes necessary information is mentioned, grievance can be registered at unisox@yahoo.com
